response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a highly experienced staff/senior-level engineer with 15+ years of full-stack development spanning TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, and Kubernetes — all technically relevant to this role. However, the position is explicitly junior/mid-level entry, and bringing in someone at this seniority creates meaningful risks: salary expectations will almost certainly be misaligned, tenure will likely be short once the broader market recovers, and the candidate may struggle to find the role stimulating. The current career gap since October 2025 adds uncertainty about motivations. A short screening call to understand why the candidate is targeting this level would be necessary before proceeding.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js production expertise, including high-throughput systems (millions of HTTP req/s at Dunnhumby, millions of mailers at Optilyz)
Genuine full-stack breadth: React, REST APIs, AWS CDK, Kubernetes, TDD, CI/CD — covers the required and most nice-to-have qualifications
LLM/agentic workflow experience (MCP frameworks at re:cinq) directly matches the nice-to-have AI integration criteria
concerns: Severely overqualified at 15+ years of staff/senior experience — targeting a junior/mid role without explanation is a major retention and culture-fit risk
No explicit PostgreSQL experience; primary database exposure is MongoDB and MySQL, not the preferred relational stack
Unexplained career gap since October 2025 raises questions about availability, current market positioning, and whether this application reflects genuine interest or desperation

key_factors.factor: No PostgreSQL or relational DB specialization
